body:
This PR updates the feature branch for #120 (`orad/emulator-interface`):
1) all examples now use the new modular `Emulator()` interface. The output of examples either reproduces the current code in `/master` exactly, or corrects known issues in `/master`.
2) fixes [buildkite errors](https://github.com/CliMA/CalibrateEmulateSample.jl/pull/120#issuecomment-1018001476) currently encountered on PR #120. As described in issue #125, these are due to julia 1.5.4 being specified in `.buildkite/pipeline.yml`, while Manifest package versions in `orad/emulator-interface` are for julia 1.6. This PR standardizes all aspects of the project on julia 1.6.x. 
Julia 1.6.2 is used for buildkite, since (at time of writing) the LTS release of 1.6.5 isn't installed on the buildkite cluster yet.

This PR is intended to update #120, which will then, in turn, update `master`.
title: Update examples to use Emulator interface
